programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex find themselves at the mercy of a dangerous crime kingpin from their past when they enlist his help on a case.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah´s former professor is allegedly framed for murder, Sarah calls Charlie and Rex to untangle the perfect crime.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with only one thing in common -- the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: On the third anniversary of Charlie and Rex's partnership, Charlie recounts how a high-stakes kidnapping brought the duo together on their first case.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: While on the hunt for an escaped murderer, Charlie and Rex are held hostage; when a greater threat emerges, Charlie and his captor are forced to work together if they're going to make it out alive.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A mummified body is discovered in Newfoundland´s tundra; Charlie and Rex set off in search of a community of survivalists who may be harboring a murderer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A scuba diver washes ashore with his oxygen supply severed; Charlie dives into the Atlantic Ocean to uncover the secret he was killed to protect.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The near poisoning of a wealthy socialite throws the team into a perilous investigation that puts Charlie, Rex, and even Jesse in harms way.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A young woman is abducted from the very spot her friend was murdered two years earlier; Charlie and Rex race against time as they trail the suspects from the original investigation.

programme.title: Cold Blood
programme.desc: A legendary retired hit man (Jean Reno) lives in isolation in the barren North American wilderness. When he rescues a woman from a snowmobiling accident, he soon discovers that she's harboring a secret that forces him to return to his lethal ways.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: After several years away, FBI agent Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) returns to find his mother, Marty (Meg Ryan), a much different person: Having long mourned for Henry's father, she is now embracing single life. One day, while Marty, Henry and his new fiancée, Emily (Selma Blair), are out for a walk, they meet Tommy (Antonio Banderas), a mysterious stranger, with whom Marty then becomes involved. However, through his FBI contacts, Henry learns that Tommy is suspected of being an art thief.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: As a mercenary, John Seeger (Steven Seagal) has a reputation that precedes him. That's why he's being blackmailed into performing a risky job: breaking the son of a wealthy arms dealer out of a South African prison. With his friends taken hostage, Seeger agrees to do the deed -- but finds out too late that he's been double-crossed. Not one who likes being taken for a fool, Seeger hatches an elaborate plan to get even that will make the prison break look like capture the flag.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: Fast-talking diamond dealer Kyle Miller (Nicolas Cage) and his wife, Sarah (Nicole Kidman), live the good life in a beautiful home surrounded by thick woods. Their dream life turns into a nightmare when violent thieves, led by Elias (Ben Mendelsohn), invade their home disguised as police officers. With Kyle and Sarah now frightened captives, Kyle knows he must use every negotiating trick in his book, for once Elias and his men get what they want, the Millers will likely be killed.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: Two North Carolina teens, Landon Carter and Jamie Sullivan, are thrown together after Landon gets into trouble

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: A Holocaust survivor's tragic past.

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: The story of Steve Jobs' ascension from college dropout into one of the most revered creative entrepreneurs of the 20th century

programme.title: Glengarry Glen Ross
programme.desc: An examination of the machinations behind the scenes at a real estate office.

programme.title: The Principal
programme.desc: At the toughest high school in town, the biggest troublemaker is the principal. Edited for TV

programme.title: Crazy In Alabama
programme.desc: An abused wife heads to Hollywood to become a TV star while her nephew back in Alabama witnesses a racially motivated murder.

programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: A small-time gambler gets more than he bargained for when his car breaks down near a remote desert town.

programme.title: Death At A Funeral
programme.desc: Directed by Neil LaBute, Death at a Funeral is a hilarious day in the life of an American family that has come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest. As mourners gather at the family home, shocking revelations, festering resentments, ugly threats, blackmail and a misdirected corpse unleash lethal and riotous mayhem.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: A decorated war veteran becomes entangled in the search for a fellow Medal of Honor winner's killer.

programme.title: Pushover
programme.desc: An honest detective's pursuit of a bank robber drags him into a deadly affair with the crook's moll.

programme.title: A Woman Of Distinction
programme.desc: A publicist's efforts to create a buzz about a British astronomer's visit create personal and professional problems for a career-minded dean of a women's college.

programme.title: Hook, Line And Sinker
programme.desc: Thinking he's dying, a poor schnook goes on a $100,000 spending spree only to find out he's as healthy as a horse.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes To Washington
programme.desc: James Stewart takes on the powers-that-be in our nations capitol in Frank Capras timeless classic. Nominated for eleven 1939 Oscars, including best picture.

programme.title: Language Lessons
programme.desc: A Spanish teacher and her student develop an unexpected friendship.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: Quinn (Scott Adkins, Doctor Strange), a member of a SWAT unit, steps out of a park fountain in an Asian city with no recollection of who he is or where he came from. As he pieces together clues from his past, he vaguely recalls his young daughter, who has been kidnapped. Meanwhile, Conner (Andy On, Zombie Fight Club), a former military operative turned gangster-for-hire, discovers that his wife has also disappeared mysteriously in the middle of the night. These two men, with little in common, realize they must work together to find their loved ones and thwart their mysterious abductors.

programme.title: Losin' It
programme.desc: Set in 1965, four rowdy teenage guys travel to Tijuana, Mexico for a night of partying when they are joined by a heartbroken housewife who is in town seeking a quick divorce.

programme.title: Sharktopus vs. Whalewolf
programme.desc: When a mad scientist mixes the genes of a killer whale and a wolf, it creates the Whalewolf, and it's up to Sharktopus to stop it.

programme.title: Iron Mask
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger and Jackie Chan face off against each other in battle in this globe-trotting adventure!

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: A humble businessman with a buried past seeks justice when his daughter is killed in an act of terrorism.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: A police inspector tracks down a deranged villain who is out to kidnap his daughter.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: An American teen joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Defeated by Master Ip, martial arts expert Cheung Tin Chi tries to lead a normal life in Hong Kong until triad leaders draw him back into fighting.

programme.title: Hydra
programme.desc: While working as a chef in Tokyo, a retired assassin becomes drawn into a brutal death game.

programme.title: A Janitor
programme.desc: Fukumi is a high school janitor whose father was a gangster. He works at the school as a janitor instead of belonging to the gang so he can watch out for Yui, the daughter of his deceased father's brother Majima Yoshiki.

programme.title: The Foggy Mountain
programme.desc: A fearless martial-arts master seeks revenge for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: The Golden Cane Warrior
programme.desc: When an aging martial arts master chooses two of her meeker students to be her successors, two older students steal her mystical cane and pursue their rivals.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Driven Underground
programme.desc: Single mom Sarah hides her family in Oregon when her daughter is a witness in a murder against the mob.

programme.title: Wild Faith
programme.desc: A Civil War vet makes peace with his losses and starts a new life with the world resisting change around him.

programme.title: Come Dance at My Wedding
programme.desc: A woman faces opposition from her estranged father when she plans to sell the family's dance studio.

programme.title: When Love Came To Town
programme.desc: Abby, an author is used to making up quirky, charming characters, but here in Bliss they have sprung to life.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Animal 2
programme.desc: James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) took the fall for the crimes of his older son (Vicellous Shannon) and is now serving a life term at Folsom Prison. When his younger son, James Jr. (K.C. Collins), is framed for murder, Allen refuses to let two men from the same family submit to life imprisonment for crimes they didn't commit. When he learns that James Jr. was set up by someone at the prison, he resolves to win his son's freedom. To do this, he must return to his violent brawler roots.

programme.title: The Recall
programme.desc: When five friends vacation at a remote lake house they expect nothing less than a good time, unaware that planet Earth is under an alien invasion and mass-abduction.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When dangerous street thug James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) is sent to prison, he continues his violent ways working for fellow inmate Kassada (Chazz Palminteri). This changes after Animal encounters Berwell (Jim Brown), a revolutionary who introduces him to the writings of Malcolm X. Animal reforms, realizing that murder and crime are destroying his community. After Animal is released, he goes home to find his son, Darius (Terrence Dashon Howard), involved in gang activity just like he was.

programme.title: GRIT
programme.desc: Three estranged brothers, Jason Jarell, and Josiah, are brought together by their sister Laura’s death. The brothers make a pact to uncover the truth behind her murder, setting off a perilous journey into the dark political world, where they forge unexpected alliances in order to get justice for Laura.

programme.title: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A self-absorbed and ill-equipped father struggles to reconnect with his estranged and embittered son following his discovery of his affair with another woman. Wanting to defend his mother’s honor, his son decides to seek revenge on the mistress.

When the remains of an apartheid-era policeman are discovered 60 years after he went missing, a retired singer revisits her past to help with the investigation. But how much does she know, and what is she holding back?

programme.title: The Drive
programme.desc: A doctor is driving home from a conference when he learns his daughter has been kidnapped, and the betrayal comes from those closest to him. With each mile, the certainty that someone within his trusted circle is responsible turns the journey into a spiral of shock and resolve, as the threat to his daughter’s life grows more personal and more urgent.

programme.title: Don Dada
programme.desc: Desperate to survive a brutal Chicago winter, Rah Jah and Tee Tee hustle for food and shelter in the streets. When a botched deal lands him in the hands of powerful crime bosses, he rises to the top of the hierarchy at a deadly cost.

programme.title: Shark Warning!
programme.desc: A man returns home years after his brother was killed by a shark, but the shark is back. He must get revenge.

programme.title: Tomb Invader
programme.desc: Determined to find out why her mother disappeared, an adventurer enters the dangerous Tomb of Quin Shi Huang.

programme.title: The Terminators
programme.desc: A small band of resistance fighters battle the cyborgs that have taken control of the planet.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: The heroes arrive in the farming outpost that produces flour for bizkits.

programme.title: Shark Warning!
programme.desc: A man returns home years after his brother was killed by a shark, but the shark is back. He must get revenge.

programme.title: Planetquake
programme.desc: A team of leading seismologists must stop a series of earthquakes before it breaks apart the Earth.

programme.title: 400 Days
programme.desc: Four astronauts Captain Theo Cooper, Dr. Emily McTier, Bug Kieslowski, and Cole Dvorak are sent on a simulated mission to a distant planet to test the psychological effects of deep space travel. Locked away for 400 days, the crew's mental state begins to deteriorate when they lose all communication with the outside world. Forced to exit the ship, they wonder if the mission is a simulation after all.

programme.title: Road Games (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A laid-back American truck driver in south Australia starts to suspect a man driving a green van of killing young women along his route, and proceeds to play a cat-and-mouse game in order to catch him red-handed.

programme.title: The Awakening
programme.desc: Cohen Media Group presents THE AWAKENING, a supernatural thriller starring Rebecca Hall (The Town, Iron Man 3) and Dominic West (HBO's The Wire). Set in London in 1921, Florence Cathcart (Hall), author of the popular book Seeing Through Ghosts, has devoted her career to exposing claims of the supernatural as nothing but hoaxes. Haunted by the recent death of her fianc, she is approached by Robert Mallory (West) to investigate the recent death of a student at the all-boys boarding school where he teaches. When students at the school report sightings of the young boys ghost, she decides to take on the case. Initially, the mystery surrounding the ghost appears nothing more than a schoolboy prank, but as Florence continues to investigate events at the school, she begins to believe that her reliance on science may not be enough to explain the strange phenomenon going on around her.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: As Evelin struggles with her pregnancy, more and more people are succumbing to the sickness, the origin of which policeman Mikkel begins to question.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: As outsiders and insiders begin to gather on the island, and personal lives grow increasingly complex, the first casualties of the virus appear.

programme.title: Beast from Haunted Cave
programme.desc: A giant spider stalks a band of thieves in this schlocky thriller from Gene Corman Productions. The story follows gangster Alexander Ward and his crew as they enlist the help of a local ski-instructor in the heist of several gold bars. But when they use explosives to create a distraction, they disturb the lair of a massive spider! Monte Hellman, the man behind such cult favorites as Two-Lane Blacktop, made his directorial debut with Beast From Haunted Cave. Trivia note: This movie debuted on a double bill with The Wasp Woman.

programme.title: The Nightshifter
programme.desc: Stênio works the graveyard shift in the morgue of a vast, violent city. Each night he prepares the lifeless corpses for examination, but he's never alone. For Stênio can talk to the dead...

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: The forces of nature tremble with an unseen evil in this chilling western tale of madness, paranoia and supernatural terror howling across the homestead.

programme.title: The Noonday Witch
programme.desc: After movingto a rural village, Eliska must protect her daughter from the mysterious woman who haunts the surrounding farm fields.

programme.title: The Reckoning
programme.desc: Thrown in jail after being falsely accused of being a witch, Grace must endure extreme physical persecution at the hands of a ruthless witch hunter.

programme.title: The Dark and the Wicked
programme.desc: On a secluded farm, a man is bedridden and fighting through his final breaths while his wife slowly succumbs to overwhelming grief. Siblings Louise and Michael return home to help, but it doesn't take long for them to see that something's wrong with mom-something more than her heavy sorrow. Gradually, they begin to suffer a darkness similar to their mother's, marked by waking nightmares and a growing sense that an evil entity is taking over their family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: In Old Cheyenne
programme.desc: Roy Rogers plays a newspaper reporter sent to Cheyenne to investigate a reputed troublemaker. While on the scene, he discovers who the real bad guys are, and sets out to right some wrongs. Also starring Roy's usual sidekick George 'Gabby' Hayes, plus Joan Woodbury, and George Rosener. This Republic Pictures western was helmed by director Joseph Kane (The Undersea Kingdom, Dakota) and features two musical numbers: 'Bonita' and 'Linda Flor'.

programme.title: Colorado Sundown
programme.desc: Murder among ranchers is the subject of this Republic Pictures drama. Starring such names as Rex Allen, Slim Pickins, and Chester Clute, this feature was directed by William Whitney. For Trivia Buffs: At one time Whitney was known as the youngest director in Hollywood, having been hired by the newly formed Republic Pictures at the tender age of 21.

programme.title: Leather Burners
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) gets the call when a herd of rustled cattle mysteriously disappear. Andy Clyde, Victor Jory and George Reeves (televisions Superman!) also star in this, the 42nd of 66 Hopalong Cassidy features. If you look closely, you might even notice Robert Mitchum in an uncredited role!

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: After a condemned gunfighter (Steve Forrest) survives his own hanging, he helps a young widow stop a pitiless land baron from taking her ranch. This television feature boasts a strong cast of recognizable characters, including Will Geer, Sharon Acker, Dean Jagger, BarBara Luna, and Cameron Mitchell. Director Michael Caffey would go on to work on such hit shows as Barnaby Jones and MacGyver. Also, look for John Mitchum, younger brother of Robert, in a small role. This movie originally aired on ABC-TV and was considered the pilot for a possible series. Writer/producer Andrew Fenady was behind several opular TV shows such as Branded and The Rebel, as well as the 1970 John Wayne feature, Chisum.

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Theres trouble out west! Its the Civil War and the Union needs troops back east to defend itself. Roy Rogers stars as Lieutenant Jerry Burke, who is sent to investigate why the returning troops are being stalled in Colorado. Also starring Gabby Hayes, Pauline Moore, and Milburn Stone, this film is action packed with a turn you wont see coming!

programme.title: Man from Utah
programme.desc: WHIRLING ROPES AND SNARLING GUNS IN THE GALLOPING GRIP OF A GLAMOROUS DRAMA! John Wayne stars as John Weston, a man hired to investigate shady doings at a local rodeo. It seems all the riders who are on the verge of winning end up dead. Along with Wayne, this tale of action on the range also stars the usual Lone Star Picture stock company, including Gabby Hayes and Yakima Canutt!

programme.title: High Lonesome
programme.desc: A young drifter is suspected of murder in this stirring production from writer/director Alan Le May (best known for writing The Searchers). John Drew Barrymore stars as Cooncat, a troubled young man who has to steal to survive. With no friends in West Texas, he falls in with some bad customers who involve him in some terrible crimes. The strong cast includes Chill Wills, Jack Elam, and John Archer, with cinematography by Oscar winner W. Howard Greene.

programme.title: PREVIEW: Renault Alpine A110, the Porsche Cayman rival

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.desc: Did you know that Louisiana is the country's biggest producer of blue crabs? Celebrate the blue crab with Emeril's crab and corn fritters, chilled avocado soup with crab relish, and crabmeat stuffed trout with vodka butter sauce.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp? Emeril presents two delicious recipes.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Preparing a delicious and nutritious weeknight meal for the family is not always easy but Lidia shares some of her quickest and simplest recipes that will work in any kitchen. The menu includes: Carrot and Apple Salad; Salmon Fillets with Prosecco served with Savory Potatoes and Apple Crumble - a dessert that can be made with almost any seasonal fruit.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, Lidia honors the Grandmothers of the family. She starts with a delicious and quick Skillet Gratin of Mushrooms and Chicken, one of her mother's favorites. As the chicken is cooking, she heads to the side dish, Celery Potatoes and Tomatoes. Joining her at the end of the show is Lidia's granddaughter, Julia to taste Grandma Rosa's Apple Cake.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia prepares three regional Italian dishes - from Piedmont to Tuscany to Emilia Romagna. Her Peppers Piedmontese are a great addition to any antipasto or buffet table, and her Mafalde Michelangelo Style is a delicious pasta dish based on a dish attributed to Michelangelo. Lastly, she shares a Filet Mignon Italian Style with Balsamic Reduction using this liquid gold from the area of Modena.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia fell in love with the Soup and Sandwich concept shortly after she arrived in America. In this episode, she prepares a velvety Spinach and Chickpea Soup; an Italian style Baked Toast Sandwich and to finish, she enjoys some Oatmeal Crepes with her grandson Ethan.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's another episode dedicated to simplicity and delicious ingredients. Here Lidia chooses three great dishes that can be made in very little time but offer great flavors and complexity. They are great as appetizers, sides or by themselves and include Caprese Salad with Celery and Walnuts, Stuffed Artichoke with Tuna and Scallop Salad.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Everybody loves pasta! In this episode, Lidia starts with the simplest - a Spaghettini with Olive oil and Rosemary, then moves on to a hearty dish of Tagliatelle with Meatballs and Eggplant, and finishes with a delicious whole wheat pasta- Baked Whole Wheat Penne with Ceci Beans.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Smoke is the soul of barbecue. In this episode, learn to use an electric smoker, offset smoker, and upright barrel smoker to make delicious smoked treats. On the menu: cold smoked scallops with smoked tomatoes and jicama mango salsa; smoke-roasted chicken with horseradish dip; and pecan-smoked baby back ribs with prickly pear barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: In this episode, learn how to make luscious barbecued Berkshire pork belly; house-cured pastrami; and Kentucky-style barbecued lamb shoulder with an unusual black barbecue sauce called "dip". Plus, check out a new take on a classic cocktail–a smoked Manhattan!

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: It's surf and turf on Project Smoke! Learn to use smoke to jazz up this classic combo with smoked shrimp cocktail fired up with chipotle chiles and a Yucatan orange cocktail sauce; fresh bacon-wrapped, lemon-and-dill-stuffed trout smoked on cedar planks; Santa Maria tri-tip reverse-seared on a pellet grill; and Chinese tea-smoked duck served taco style.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Get an inside look at the tools and fuels you need to get creative with ribs! Learn to make gigantic, grass-fed, barbecued beef ribs; Jamaican jerk spareribs from heritage breed Berkshire hogs smoked over exotic pimento wood; and spice-smoked Colorado lamb ribs with cherry barbecue sauce. Plus delectably different sides: apple-enriched, hickory-smoked coleslaw and bacon-cheddar cheese cornbread.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show is for people who want to smoke, but don't have access to a conventional wood- or charcoal-burning smoker. Learn how to use unconventional methods indoors to smoke a wide variety of ingredients from eggplant to salmon. Plus, how to smoke authentic Jamaican jerk chicken using your gas grill.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show celebrates beef in all its smoky glory, from a new twist on beef jerky to beef tenderloin smoked in an upright barrel smoker and Texas-style smoked brisket. Plus, learn how to make smokehouse beans and ember-roasted bell peppers.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: It's Bacon Mania on Project Smoke! Learn to make bacon from scratch at home and a new twist on Canadian bacon: pork loin in fennel brine smoked in a ceramic cooker. Then check out the "Tulsa Torpedo", a spectacular three pounds of porky goodness encased in a crispy bacon weave. Plus, bacon surf and turf in the form of bacon-wrapped Snow Crab Poppers.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Go hog wild with this pork-themed episode! Learn to use a wood-burning rotisserie to make a coffee-crusted whole pork loin with redeye barbecue sauce. Then find out how to make herbed pork shoulder with peppery West Virginia mustard sauce. Plus, find out how to cure and hickory-smoke a spectacular shoulder ham and get the scoop on how to make barbecued cabbage with smoked cheese and chorizo.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes

Hoping to rid the town of the farmers, the cowboys set fire to their camp, and a desperado murders a homesteader, but Dan refuses to allow them revenge. Joining a posse under a crooked sheriff, and with the help of singer Rita (Ann Dvorak) and a merchant, Dan forces a peaceful showdown between the factions.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: Quirt Evans (John Wayne), a cowboy on the run, is injured when his horse stumbles near a Quaker family's land. The family takes him in as he regains his health, and he falls for their young daughter, Penelope (Gail Russell). As Quirt falls deeper in love and becomes accustomed to the family's peaceful ways, his violent past starts to catch up to him. Eventually he is forced to decide whether it is worth letting go of his turbulent former life for his future with Penelope.

programme.desc: An inmate interrupts the booking process. A couple is brought in after signs of a domestic dispute but claim they were being intimate, and a jailed woman shares some of her Webcam exploits.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A party of three girls are brought in after having been arrested for possession at a nearby music festival. Drugs are found on the person of a music festival attendee during intake. A slightly older party goer is taken into custody for possession.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Reno, NV a woman becomes violent with officers after having over indulged in boxed wine. In Reno, NV a former marine is taken in to custody for domestic abuse.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: After cutting her head, a woman bites and kicks deputies. To investigate potential hidden meanings, a man’s tattoos are examined. A confused man is found with illegal mushrooms at a bus stop.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers fear a man may attempt to hang himself and decide to intervene. A heavily injured man ends up in jail after taking cocaine and acid. Irascibility shadows a man with low blood sugar.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Deputies deal with chaos after volatile inmates begin fighting. Accusations of deceit plague a booking as a woman is arrested for drunk driving. Prisoners are restrained after causing a commotion.

programme.desc: A hysterical woman is transferred to an isolation cell. A woman shows her undying LA pride to the arresting officers. A young woman is put under observation for threatening harm to herself.

programme.desc: An inmate refuses to be handcuffed while officers seek to search his cell for contraband. A man tells deputies he is known as “Baby Boy” amongst the ladies. Fights erupt during prison phone time.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Sunrises and Sunsets
programme.desc: Beautiful sunrises and sunsets from around the globe. Locations include: Thailand, the Seychelles, Canyonlands National Park, Bali, the Pacific Coast and migratory birds in the National Wildlife Refuges.

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Down By The Bay - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see cat wearing a hat? How about a goat rowing a boat? Well you can in this video for the classic children’s song, Down By The Bay!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett arrive with a “magic lamp” for Asya in Turkey. She wants a genie to grant her wishes but the lamp does not work, so Jett offers to become her genie. Dizzy comes and helps to fly a magic carpet to Cappadocia where Asya brings ice cream to her Dad who is riding in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dema have to find a yeti, but there's a panda cub in danger. How will they save him?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yaari drives Tippy across the sea, but Tippy gets stuck between two icebergs. How will Jett and his super wing friends save the day?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Mayta and Jett are ready to draw something big in the ground, but it takes forever. What will Jett and Mayta do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Tae-Hun's project is finished for the science festival, but Seo-Yoon's robot goes out of control. What will Jett, Tae-Hun, and Seo-Yoon do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Kian wants to be a giant, but Aiden knocks over Grand Albert's invention, that makes Aiden become a giant. What will Jett, Donnie, Grand Albert, and Kian do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A dinosaur skeleton is finished to be put in a museum, but a dinosaur skeleton goes after the tow-truck with a magnet. What will Jett, Donnie, Paul, and Justin do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Grand Albert, and Margot go back in time to see a real mammoth, but a mother mammoth thinks they are bad guys, until a mother mammoth gets stuck in the hole in the ice. What will Jett, Grand Albert, Margot, and Erk do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Archie and Jett have to find a toy alligator. How will Jett and Archie get it back?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jules and his grandmother are making a giant waffle, but Jett accidentally adds too much yeast. Can Donnie stop the disaster?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett is on his way to Fiji to deliver a package to a girl named Tima cause it has what she and her friends need to dance in the Hibiscus Festival. But, suddenly, out of nowhere, a big whale emerged from the sea and swallowed up Jett! Would Jett find a way to get outta the whale and make his delivery?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett is on his way to deliver a package to a boy named Aaron when he is suddenly caught in a terrible storm. He loses his package and is struck by lightning knocking him into the ocean and disabling his communications with World Airport. Can Jett be rescued from the Bermuda Triangle?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Oswald has a big piano concert today, but the large piano is too big for him to play by himself. What will Jett and Oswald do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: It's Christmas in Australia, Jett and Nicole decorate for Christmas, but Santa Claus and his reindeer get tired. Will Jett and Nicole deliver more presents?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Emilia, and Adash get ready for a dragon festival, but a fly distracts them. How will Jett and Emilia stop the disaster?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Max, and his grandfather have to take a giant pumpkin to the pumpkin festival, but a pumpkin rolls away. How will Jett and Max stop the huge pumpkin?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Ndapana has a package from her friend, Stig from Finland, but she knows it never snows in Namibia, until Donnie builds a giant snow globe, and Astra adds snow inside, but the giant snow globe rolls over. What will Jett, Donnie, Astra, and Ndapana do?

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty Nursery Rhymes and Kids Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Enjoy Farmees Humpty Dumpty and popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, which the children love to sing and dance along with. Learn these kids songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Luke and Lily Baby Shark - Shark Song For Kids
programme.desc: Kids! We've taken your favorite songs like Baby Shark, The Muffin Man, Little Bo Peep and put them in a compilation for several minutes of pure, uninterrupted fun learning and singing with Luke and Lily.

programme.title: Daddy's Red Car + Fun Nursery Rhymes for Kindergarten
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Super Supremes as they sing and dance in this fun kids video. Learn preschool songs, numbers, abc, shapes, colors and more made easy and fun with this nursery rhyme and kids song playlist with rhymes like Daddy’s red car, I spy wheels on the bus, Twinkle Twinkle Little Star and more.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpy & More Kids Rhymes (Little Treehouse)
programme.desc: Do you kids know what happened to Humpty Dumpty when he sat on the wall? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with the Little Tree House gang, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Learn Street Vehicles for Children - Kids Channel
programme.desc: A cool collection of education videos for preschool kids & babies where they learn the names of color car cartoons like super trucks, helicopters, garbage trucks, ambulance, digger, loader, fire engine, tractor, bus, police car, bulldozer and more. This kids action and adventure show includes different types of transport like street, emergency, army, construction and more vehicles for children.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Kids Songs (Baby Bao Panda)
programme.desc: Do you kids know Wheels on the Bus? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with Baby Bao Panda, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Ben The Train Kids Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Ben the fun kids toy train is back with more songs and rhymes like old Macdonald, Alphabet song, phonics abc song, opposites song, incy wincy spider, five little monkeys, finger family etc. This family friendly children's show promotes learning and family bonds.

programme.title: Umi Uzi Halloween Songs for Kids
programme.desc: Umi Uzi is an adorable toddler who loves to go on adventures. She isn't afraid to explore her environment and learn new and important lessons in each episode. Nursery rhymes and children's songs are her favorite way of solving problems and learning new words. Join her this Halloween in this wonderful collection of the most popular scary songs specially made for kids!

programme.title: Super Supremes the Bath Song & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: Time for baby to take a bath! Bath time has never been so much fun! Enjoy this really fun kids song as baby takes his bath.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control-life in Berry Bitty City is impossible!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. "I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!" says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.desc: Brother and Sister adopt a puppy. Brother and Sister damage Ms. Grizzle’s flowerbed.
